title: Vodafone Idea is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vodafone Idea is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Full Stack Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
